default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Pixis and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps for their collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/zgi4j6yjwz6AQcjA-AdMDbz1phvrJ8zS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content focus should narrow to B2C digital paid campaigns, targeting specialized enterprise teams](https://fathom.video/share/zgi4j6yjwz6AQcjA-AdMDbz1phvrJ8zS?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [Need for more real examples and customer stories in content, potentially through a contributor program](https://fathom.video/share/zgi4j6yjwz6AQcjA-AdMDbz1phvrJ8zS?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [Performance optimization and content refreshes are needed for existing articles](https://fathom.video/share/zgi4j6yjwz6AQcjA-AdMDbz1phvrJ8zS?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [Keyword research and competitor analysis challenges due to emerging AI-related topics](https://fathom.video/share/zgi4j6yjwz6AQcjA-AdMDbz1phvrJ8zS?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Narrow topic focus to B2C digital paid campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/zgi4j6yjwz6AQcjA-AdMDbz1phvrJ8zS?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [Target specialized enterprise teams (e.g., Pepsi's digital ad team)](https://fathom.video/share/zgi4j6yjwz6AQcjA-AdMDbz1phvrJ8zS?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Aim for content that readers would subscribe to, similar to The Current by Trade Desk](https://fathom.video/share/zgi4j6yjwz6AQcjA-AdMDbz1phvrJ8zS?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [Develop towards a formal contributor program for expert insights](https://fathom.video/share/zgi4j6yjwz6AQcjA-AdMDbz1phvrJ8zS?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)

### Enhancing Content with Real Examples

  - [Add customer stories and real anecdotes to articles](https://fathom.video/share/zgi4j6yjwz6AQcjA-AdMDbz1phvrJ8zS?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [Create a spreadsheet with detailed case studies for writers' reference](https://fathom.video/share/zgi4j6yjwz6AQcjA-AdMDbz1phvrJ8zS?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Explore options for gathering expert quotes and insights (e.g., Slack channel, survey system)](https://fathom.video/share/zgi4j6yjwz6AQcjA-AdMDbz1phvrJ8zS?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)

### Content Optimization and Updates

  - [GrowthX can handle article refreshes, including title changes and content updates](https://fathom.video/share/zgi4j6yjwz6AQcjA-AdMDbz1phvrJ8zS?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [Add images, screenshots, and tables to enrich existing content](https://fathom.video/share/zgi4j6yjwz6AQcjA-AdMDbz1phvrJ8zS?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Focus on polishing articles that show traction](https://fathom.video/share/zgi4j6yjwz6AQcjA-AdMDbz1phvrJ8zS?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)

### Keyword Research and Competitor Analysis

  - [Current keyword list based on pain point research for target audience](https://fathom.video/share/zgi4j6yjwz6AQcjA-AdMDbz1phvrJ8zS?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
  - [Challenges in identifying content competitors due to emerging AI topics](https://fathom.video/share/zgi4j6yjwz6AQcjA-AdMDbz1phvrJ8zS?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - [Consider using customer call transcripts for keyword and topic ideas](https://fathom.video/share/zgi4j6yjwz6AQcjA-AdMDbz1phvrJ8zS?tab=summary&timestamp=1343.0)

### Performance Tracking

  - [Need access to Google Analytics 4 for comprehensive traffic data](https://fathom.video/share/zgi4j6yjwz6AQcjA-AdMDbz1phvrJ8zS?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Some AI-related keywords showing higher actual traffic than estimated search volume](https://fathom.video/share/zgi4j6yjwz6AQcjA-AdMDbz1phvrJ8zS?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Potential to update meta titles and content for articles with low click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/zgi4j6yjwz6AQcjA-AdMDbz1phvrJ8zS?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)

### Link Building Strategy

  - [GrowthX working on the next batch of links through various channels](https://fathom.video/share/zgi4j6yjwz6AQcjA-AdMDbz1phvrJ8zS?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
  - [Focusing on content types that attract backlinks in Pixis's niche](https://fathom.video/share/zgi4j6yjwz6AQcjA-AdMDbz1phvrJ8zS?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aida to conduct additional keyword research for specific advertising-related topics](https://fathom.video/share/zgi4j6yjwz6AQcjA-AdMDbz1phvrJ8zS?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [Deepak to follow up on providing Google Analytics 4 access to GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/zgi4j6yjwz6AQcjA-AdMDbz1phvrJ8zS?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)
  - [Colin to share voice notes from customer demos for content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/zgi4j6yjwz6AQcjA-AdMDbz1phvrJ8zS?tab=summary&timestamp=1343.0)
  - [GrowthX to send over the master keyword/topic list](https://fathom.video/share/zgi4j6yjwz6AQcjA-AdMDbz1phvrJ8zS?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)
